Packages that use recoder.io
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

    Describes the origin of source or object data, such as files, URLs, or archive entries.

  • Classes in recoder.io used by recoder
    Class
    Description
    ClassFileRepository
    Retrieval and storage of parsed bytecode files.
    ProjectSettings
    The project settings object manages global properties such as search and output paths, and options for the pretty printer and can save and load a textual representation of these informations.
    SourceFileRepository
    Retrieval, storage and write back of abstract syntax trees.
  • Classes in recoder.io used by recoder.io
    Class
    Description
    ClassFileRepository
    Retrieval and storage of parsed bytecode files.
    DataLocation
    Describes the origin of source or object data, such as files, URLs, or archive entries.
    PathList
    This class describes a list of search paths.
    ProjectFileIO
    Facility to import and export project settings in various project files.
    ProjectSettings
    The project settings object manages global properties such as search and output paths, and options for the pretty printer and can save and load a textual representation of these informations.
    PropertyNames
    This interface defines the known property names in the project settings.
    SourceFileRepository
    Retrieval, storage and write back of abstract syntax trees.
